DuoLector is a free, private space built for couples living in two places at once.
Chat, read, draw, write. Together — across any distance.

✨ Start for free Our story →
Scroll

Where it began

Built by a couple
for every couple

DuoLector was born from 14,000 km of distance, too many time zones, and the frustration of not having a space that truly felt like ours.

So we built one. A place with no ads, no subscriptions, and no data sold — just a quiet corner of the internet where you and your person can exist together, no matter where you are.

Today, couples in 14 countries call it home. And it's just the beginning.

Diary

Your space

Canvas

Everything in one place

Six ways to be
closer

💬

Private Chat

Your messages, only yours. Real-time, encrypted, intimate.

📖

Read Together

Sync your reading. Same page, same moment — even across continents.

🎨

Shared Canvas

A whiteboard that belongs to both of you. Draw what words can't say.

📔

Couple's Diary

Two voices, one story. Write separately, discover together.

🎵

Shared Music

Add a song. Let it play in both your spaces at the same time.

🔥

Challenges

Set goals together. Walk the same km. Grow stronger, even apart.

You're not alone

A growing community
of real couples

Every day, more couples choose DuoLector as their shared home. We grow together — and every feature we build is shaped by the people who live it.
